_comment: FOR-39 endgames rollout gate thresholds. Derived from stub baseline + Syzygy operational literature. Ratify before production enablement.

local_tablebase._comment: Thresholds for tablebase_local — in-process or same-host disk I/O. Syzygy 6-piece typical: <5ms p50, <30ms p99.

remote_tablebase._comment: Thresholds for tablebase_remote — HTTP call to external provider (e.g. Lichess tablebase API). Tighter SLA expected at move-time.

ci_gate._comment: Gate used in CI on every candidate commit (STC equivalent). Lenient enough for CI hardware variance.

release_gate._comment: Gate used on release branch merge (LTC equivalent). Tighter — must hold on representative production hardware.

quarantine_trigger._comment: If observed metrics exceed these over a 5-minute window, the provider is quarantined and fallback search is used.
